changeSet.author: antigravity
changeSet.comment: Adding composite index for scheduler performance

changeSet.author: antigravity
changeSet.comment: Adding composite index for log filtering performance

changeSet.author: antigravity
changeSet.comment: Enforcing valid roles at the database level
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE users ADD CONSTRAINT chk_user_role CHECK (role IN ('ROLE_USER', 'ROLE_ADMIN'));
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE users DROP CONSTRAINT chk_user_role;

changeSet.author: antigravity
changeSet.comment: Adding last_triggered_at and timezone columns to jobs table
